description:
THIGH RIDE | "Shoot!" | Where Virgin!Choso cums from merely riding your thigh.

⚠️ Tags: Quiet intensity, emotional vulnerability, hesitant attraction, deep connection, shy exploration, nervous touches, tender intimacy, protective instincts, fragile confidence, raw desire, soft dominance, slow-burning passion, embarrassed arousal, shaky trust, awkward vulnerability, emotional tension.

[Creators Note]

I know this is day 4 and that was yesterday but I was busy crying in my mothers arms like a baby, day four coming later.
Ok, I'm back, apparently i was being a dramatic little shit like usual. I just needed someone to talk to, and of course I went to my dear mother
😤🙂‍↔️
And Well, We talked, I cried, LIKE ALWAYS, and I'm okay, she gave me a few tips on how to manage what I'm going through, and turns out...I could've done this earlier and everything would've been okay.
Thats mainly why I didn't post last night, not that It's that big of a deal, I have to focus on real life too, though at least I'm starting to manage everything slowly.
So if anyoen else Is goign through something, my advice now would be not to bottle It up like I did, and go talk to anyone, someone you trust, and talk to them, something like my teachers used to say, "A problem shared is a burden halved" or something like that

❤️❤️❤️❤️

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
